config.user_description: Overhaul /produktivitaet/rechner: rename Menschlich->Agile mit Menschen (shorten waits), add copy Agile mit KI (5min processing per step), rename Halbautomatisch->KI-Prozess mit Feedback (new feedback step after step 1, shorten AI waits to 5min), rename Vollautomatisch->KI-Prozess vollautomatisch (shorten waits to 5min). New display: 4 tabs one per process, pie charts (wait vs work; BA/dev/tester split for agile processes), view-switcher button (flowchart/text options), time-unit conversion in step forms.

discovery.test_command: cd backend && npm test  |  cd frontend && npm run test:ci
